properties.name: spring.vision.jpa.enabled
properties.description: Enable Spring Vision JPA support (entities, repositories, vector adapters).

properties.name: spring.vision.jpa.enhanced-template
properties.description: When true, exposes the vector-enabled VisionTemplate as the primary template.

properties.name: spring.vision.vector.provider
properties.description: Vector similarity provider to use: AUTO, PGVECTOR, ORACLE, MYSQL, JPA, H2.
